enhancedPenalties.penalty: Only 82 words - thin content is invisible to AI (need 800+ words)
enhancedPenalties.explanation: Thin content (under 300 words) rarely ranks. Search engines prefer comprehensive content that thoroughly covers topics. AI systems like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity need substantial content to cite and reference.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Expand content to at least 800 words. Add sections covering: what (define your topic), why (explain benefits), how (describe process), benefits (list advantages), examples (provide use cases), and FAQs (answer 5-10 common questions). Focus on depth and value over word count.

enhancedPenalties.component: SEO Technical Excellence - Very slow page load time - critical performance issue
enhancedPenalties.explanation: This issue impacts how search engines and AI systems understand and rank your content.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Review and update this element following current best practices for search engines and AI systems.

enhancedPenalties.component: SEO Content Quality - Insufficient content to evaluate readability
enhancedPenalties.penalty: Need at least 300 words for meaningful content
enhancedPenalties.explanation: This issue impacts how search engines and AI systems understand and rank your content.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Review and update this element following current best practices for search engines and AI systems.

enhancedPenalties.explanation: AI systems look for expertise signals (credentials, experience, data). Content without these signals is considered less authoritative.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Add author bio with credentials. Include "About the Author" section. Link to LinkedIn/professional profiles. Cite experience and qualifications.

enhancedPenalties.explanation: AI systems prioritize content that directly answers questions. Content without clear Q&A patterns gets ignored.
enhancedPenalties.fix:
Add FAQ section with 5-10 common questions. Use

for questions,

for answers. Start answers with direct responses (Yes/No, specific number).

enhancedPenalties.explanation: Overly promotional content is flagged as biased by AI systems. Neutral, informative tone increases trust and citation likelihood.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Remove promotional language ("best", "amazing", "revolutionary"). Use neutral, factual tone. Replace "we offer" with "this includes". Focus on information, not selling.

enhancedPenalties.explanation: AI systems prioritize content with specific data, statistics, and facts. Vague claims without evidence are ignored.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Add specific statistics, percentages, and numbers. Cite sources for all data. Include dates for time-sensitive information. Use "According to [source]" format.

enhancedPenalties.penalty: Missing LocalBusiness or Restaurant schema for a pizzeria
enhancedPenalties.explanation: Incomplete or incorrect schema markup confuses AI systems and prevents them from citing your content accurately.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Validate schema at schema.org/validator. Fix all errors. Add required properties: name, description, image, url. Remove placeholder data.

enhancedPenalties.component: SEO Content Quality - Thin content - needs substantial expansion
enhancedPenalties.explanation: This issue impacts how search engines and AI systems understand and rank your content.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Review and update this element following current best practices for search engines and AI systems.

enhancedPenalties.explanation: AI systems prefer well-formatted, concise content. Walls of text or poor structure make content hard to parse and cite.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Use bullet points for lists. Keep paragraphs to 3-4 sentences. Add subheadings every 200-300 words. Use bold for key terms (sparingly).

enhancedPenalties.explanation: Clear definition statements help AI systems understand and explain concepts. Missing definitions reduce citation likelihood.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Start with a clear definition: "X is [category] that [key characteristic]". Example: "SEO is a marketing strategy that improves website visibility in search results."

enhancedPenalties.penalty: Low density of named entities and specific facts (severity: 55/100)
enhancedPenalties.explanation: AI systems look for specific entities (people, places, things, concepts). Low entity density suggests vague, unhelpful content.
enhancedPenalties.fix: Add specific names, numbers, dates, and locations. Replace vague terms ("many", "some") with exact figures. Link to Wikipedia for key entities.
